loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing operational status (control, breaker) and health indicators (power, frequency, voltage) from live data; runtime-specific metrics (service hours, starts, total runs, availability) are not measured by this meter and are shown as placeholders.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing total run-hours as accumulated energy (kWh) and average load as load factor (%), because the meter does not log dedicated run-hours or start-count columns.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active/reactive/apparent energy for the last 7 days. MTBF, MTTR, and energy fractions are not directly measured by this meter and are omitted (honest-blank).

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing Active, Reactive, and Apparent Power trends plus Energy Delivered. The card's native 'Autonomy/Readiness' score slots are honest-blanked as they require battery/UPS data not measured by this DG meter; the series labels have been morphed to reflect the actual power/energy metrics being plotted.
